name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-26
title: Move new-feature.py from rabbit-cage to rabbit-feature
description: Inv 40 currently exempts new-feature.py from full removal because rabbit-feature-new still depends on .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/new-feature.py. Plan: relocate the script under .claude/features/rabbit-feature/scripts/ alongside the other rabbit-feature-* tooling, update rabbit-feature-new's invocation path, then drop new-feature.py from the rabbit-cage Inv 40 enumeration. This backlog pins the cleanup so it does not linger.

history.note: Cycle complete: new-feature.py relocated to rabbit-feature/scripts/, all references updated, all test suites pass.
